summary: Produce media assets and delivery packages across image, video, audio, and adaptation workflows.

capabilities.summary: Turn a media request into an executable brief, asset inventory, and acceptance contract.
Produce the requested media assets with tool choices, source tracking, and output targets.
Adapt source assets into derived sizes, aspect ratios, cuts, and delivery formats.
Review media outputs for quality, compliance, packaging, and handoff readiness.

workflows.summary: Normalize goals, audience, deliverables, references, and policy constraints.
Choose tools, source assets, shot lists, and production order before execution.
Create the primary media outputs and intermediate artifacts.
Check technical quality, policy compliance, and packaging before handoff.
